Action: Are you sure you want to restore this version? The current content will be saved as a new version first.
Handling: Er du sikker på, at du vil gendanne denne version? Det aktuelle indhold vil blive gemt som en ny version først.

Action: Content has been restored from version. The previous state was saved as a new version.
Handling: Indholdet er blevet gendannet fra version. Den tidligere tilstand blev gemt som en ny version.

Action: Delete versions older than this many days. Set to 0 for unlimited.
Handling: Slet versioner ældre end de mange dage. Sæt til 0 for ubegrænset.

Action: Maximum number of versions to keep per entity. Set to 0 for unlimited.
Handling: Maksimalt antal versioner der skal beholdes per enhed. Sæt til 0 for ubegrænset.

Action: No versions available. Versions are created when content is saved.
Handling: Ingen versioner tilgængelige. Versioner oprettes, når indholdet gemmes.
